episodes.name: All Episodes Combined
episodes.overview: In a college divided between OGs and BGs, Leader of the OG gang 'Ruthless' , Rihanna plans a rebellion. Netra, an outsider, is left stumped. Chaos ensues as the Police arrives after receiving a panic call.As tensions rise, Netra makes a big confession setting the stage for a power struggle!

episodes.name: All Episodes Combined
episodes.overview: A struggle for power happens between Netra and Rihanna, who both want to be the leader of the newly formed ‘MAD’ crew. It is only a crew on paper, the OGs and BGs can’t put their differences aside. Netra has a bigger crisis to worry about as someone closes in on her true identity.
